title: Open day at George Lakes Yacht Club
description: GEORGE NEWS - For the last seventy years,...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - For the last seventy years, George Lakes Yacht Club (GLYC) has been sharing their passion for sailing.


> The club invites families and individuals to visit them on their open day, Sunday, 16 February at Island Lake from 12:00.


You will see what a Club Regatta day looks like, what rigging a vessel entails, and what to do when there is no wind or lots of wind - depending on the weather!

Meet the sailors, both old and young, and learn more about the club and development school.

Sailing teaches resilience, problem-solving, self-reliance and a spirit of adventure. It is also a fantastic family activity.

Click here for more information.

Come see what a Club Regatta day looks like at the George Lakes Yacht Club.

Sailing teaches resilience, problem-solving, self-reliance and a spirit of adventure.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
